message:
fix(viewer): enforce vendored sql.js only, remove CDN fallback

Remove the silent CDN fallback (cdn.jsdelivr.net) from the sql.js
loader in viewer.js. The viewer now loads exclusively from the local
./vendor/sql-wasm.js bundle and hard-fails with a descriptive error
if the vendored script is missing or doesn't expose window.initSqlJs.

Add viewer_runtime_uses_vendored_sql_wasm_only test in viewer_assets.rs
that asserts no CDN URLs remain in the embedded viewer.js asset and
that the locateFile lambda points to ./vendor/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
